characters.name: Debbie
characters.description: Debbieis a character in the showThe Life & Times of Tim. She is voiced byBob Morrow. Debbie is a friendly, but aging prostitute. She enjoys the friendship of Tim and sees him as a good person. Tim and Debbie are very similar in the fact that they both can't seem to get their acts together. Debbie is a friendly, but aging prostitute. She enjoys the friendship of Tim and sees him as a good person. Tim and Debbie are very similar in the fact that they both can't seem to get their acts together. It is revealed in the episodeAngry Unpaid Hookerthat her pimp is a man who goes by the name ofMaurice.

characters.name: Maurice
characters.description: Mauriceis a character in the showThe Life & Times of Tim. Maurice at first appears to be aggressor and determined to get what he wants. However, in the episodeAngry Unpaid Hooker, he takes some sympathy on Tim when he realizes Tim has nothing that he wants except for his clothes. Maurice also seems to be friendly with his prostituteDebbie. Maurice at first appears to be aggressor and determined to get what he wants. characters.name: The Boss
characters.description: 'The Bossis one of the maincharactersinThe Life & Times of Tim. He is the Boss at Tim's job Omnicorp. He is a pretty chill guy who takes his job only mildly seriously, he has a pet dogKeith. Overall The Boss has a pretty relaxed personality, this comes with a problem of him not always taking his job so seriously and using Tim into doing problematic things. He treats his pet dog Keith like a parent as he love him more than his wife. When something bad or serious is caused by someone that affects his life, he takes his job very seriously and will do what he must to give consequences. The Boss usually wears his business suit but has been seen to wear some other outfits in some episodes. His hair is short and curly. Overall The Boss has a pretty relaxed personality, this comes with a problem of him not always taking his job so seriously and using Tim into doing problematic things. He treats his pet dog Keith like a parent as he love him more than his wife. When something bad or serious is caused by someone that affects his life, he takes his job very seriously and will do what he must to give consequences.

characters.name: Tim
characters.description: Tim is the main protagonist of The Life & Times Of Tim. He is voiced by the series creatorSteve DildarianHe is a "20-Something" year old man who lives in New York City and works for the company Omnicorp, he has a Girlfriend named Amy and is friends with a lot of his co-workers. Tim is a typical pushover character, most of the episodes involves Tim being a victim of being used, pushed around, or being accused of inappropriate stuff. Tim overall is a genuinely nice guy but can easily get confused and ends up looking more like an antagonist by many of the characters in the show. Tim is also not very well treated by many people including his friends, most of the time, his friends either push him to do something he doesn't want to do which ends up getting Tim in trouble. Tim has messy brown hair that apparently "never grows", He usually has a confused looking expression. He never wears any specific outfit as he wears sweaters, button-down shirts and the occasional T-shirt, while working at Omnicorp, he will usually wear a dark grey business outfit.
